title: IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur)
short_info: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position. Candidates holding B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech or equivalent in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Electronics Engineering/Electrical Engineering or relevant discipline with 1st class are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active from 20 May 2026 to 15 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the n

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech or equivalent in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Electronics Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/ relevant discipline with 1st class. NET/GATE qualified candidates will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech or equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a relevant discipline, with a first-class academic record.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIITDM Jabalpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIITDM Jabalpur located?
faq.answer: IIITDM Jabalpur is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 482005.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 3858/CST/R&D/Phy. & Engg. and Pharmacy/2025-26.

faq.question: Q9. Are NET/GATE qualified candidates preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, NET/GATE qualified candidates will be preferred for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
